meta.title: SafeLand — Morocco Blockchain Land Registry
meta.description: Decentralized land management platform for the Kingdom of Morocco

hero.tagline: The Sovereign Blockchain Land Registry of the Kingdom of Morocco
hero.subtitle: Land security through NFTs • Automated fiscal escrow • Fridda succession • Multi-sig justice

problem.label: The Problem
problem.title: A land system vulnerable to fraud
items: Multiple sales of the same property

solution.label: The Solution
solution.title: SafeLand: trust through blockchain
items: Unfalsifiable and traceable NFT land titles
Atomic escrow with automatic DGI/ANCFCC tax split
Fridda succession compliant with Islamic law (24 shares)

features.label: Architecture
features.title: 5 Sovereign Smart Contracts
features.subtitle: A modular UUPS upgradeable architecture, compliant with OpenZeppelin v5 standards

nft.title: SafeLandNFT
nft.subtitle: ERC-721 — Land Titles
nft.desc: Each land title is a unique NFT with IPFS metadata: type, area, geolocation, document hash. Secure transfers with multi-role verification (Agent, Notary, Justice).

registry.title: SafeLandRegistry
registry.subtitle: Central Index
registry.desc: Global registry indexing all properties by city and owner. Real-time statistics: transactions, encumbrances, frauds prevented, judicial interventions.

escrow.title: SafeLandEscrow
escrow.subtitle: Atomic Fiscal Escrow
escrow.desc: Atomic real estate transactions with automatic tax split: 4% DGI + 1% ANCFCC + 95% seller. Sequencing: creation → seller signature → buyer deposit → notary validation.

fridda.title: SafeLandFridda
fridda.subtitle: ERC-1155 — Successions
fridda.desc: Succession engine compliant with Islamic law with 24 shares (fara'id). Automatic distribution, governance by heir proposals/votes, notarial finalization.

justice.title: SafeLandJustice
justice.subtitle: Judicial Multi-Sig
justice.desc: Ministry of Justice interventions: judicial freeze, burn & remint (Justice Override), social key recovery. Configurable M-of-N threshold.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: UUPS + AccessControl + ReentrancyGuard
security.desc: Upgradeable contracts via UUPS proxy. Granular role-based access control (Admin, Agent, Notary, Judge, Conservator). Reentrancy protection on all critical functions.

agent.name: Land Agent
agent.desc: Creation and management of NFT titles

cta.title: Ready to secure Moroccan land?
cta.subtitle: Connect your MetaMask wallet and explore the sovereign blockchain land registry.
